settings.title: Your Design Fee
settings.subtitle: Review your submission and pay the design fee to begin the design process.
settings.step1_text: Our designers create three original design concepts based on your brief.
settings.step2_text: Professional jewelry CAD visualization. Up to two revisions.
settings.step3_text: Once approved, we provide final production pricing.
settings.includes_items: Three custom design concepts,Professional jewelry CAD visualization,Up to two revisions,Production feasibility review,Final manufacturing quote
settings.fee_note: Covers three original design concepts and CAD visualization.
settings.fee_credit: Your design fee will be credited toward production if you proceed.
settings.ownership_text: All design concepts remain property of Azoir & Co until production is commissioned.
settings.refund_text: Design fees are non-refundable once work has commenced.
